title: Squirrel Removal in Cobble Hill, Brooklyn | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Cobble Hill, Brooklyn. Safe, humane extraction from brownstones & historic homes. Licensed experts. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Squirrels invading your Cobble Hill brownstone or historic townhouse? Our specialized squirrel removal services protect your property from attic damage, chewed wiring, and entry point destruction. Best Pest Control NYC provides humane, effective squirrel extraction and exclusion services tailored to Cobble Hill's unique architectural landscape.
whyUs: Our technicians understand the specific challenges of Cobble Hill's historic buildings, including brownstones and pre-war structures where squirrels commonly nest in chimneys, roof eaves, and crawl spaces. We combine humane removal techniques with permanent exclusion solutions that preserve your home's architectural integrity while keeping squirrels out for good.
localContext: Cobble Hill's tree-lined streets and proximity to Cobble Hill Park create an ideal habitat for gray squirrels seeking shelter in residential attics and walls. The neighborhood's charming 19th-century brownstones and historic rowhouses, while beautiful, often have vulnerable entry points that squirrels exploit, particularly around cornices, roof joints, and aging chimney caps.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Cobble Hill?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Cobble Hill typically ranges from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and repairs needed. The price includes humane trapping, exclusion work, and sealing entry points. Historic brownstones may require additional specialized work to maintain architectural details.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Cobble Hill brownstones?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter through roof edges, soffit gaps, chimney openings, and areas where the cornice meets the roofline. In older Cobble Hill homes, deteriorated mortar, loose trim boards, and unscreened vents provide easy access. They can squeeze through holes as small as 1.5 inches and often chew to enlarge existing gaps.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods safe for historic Cobble Hill homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use specialized techniques designed for historic properties that preserve architectural integrity. Our exclusion methods protect original woodwork, masonry, and decorative elements while permanently preventing squirrel re-entry. We match materials to your home's period details and work carefully around landmark-designated features.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Cobble Hill property?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removals are completed within 3-7 days, though complete exclusion work may take 1-2 weeks depending on your property's size and condition. We offer same-day emergency inspections in Cobble Hill and can begin trapping immediately. Once all squirrels are removed, we seal entry points to prevent future infestations.
